mapper.insert: insert into attendance (emp_id, work_date, check_in_time) values (#{empId}, current_date, #{checkInTime})
mapper.select: SELECT a.emp_id, a.work_date AS startDate, a.lateness_minutes, a.reason, f.file_name AS fimeName, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.file_type, s.status AS managerCheck FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN file f ON a.attendance_id = f.attendance_id LEFT JOIN signatures s ON a.attendance_id = s.attendance_id WHERE a.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND a.lateness_minutes > 0 ORDER BY a.work_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLateCount, SUM(lateness_minutes) AS totalLateMinutes FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND lateness_minutes > 0

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.work_date) AS totalDate, -- 휴가 제외 실제 근무일 수 (COUNT(DISTINCT a.work_date) - IFNULL(SUM(lv.leave_days), 0)) AS actualWorkDays,
SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time)) AS totalTime,
SUM(CASE WHEN a.night_work_hour IS NOT NULL THEN a.night_work_hour ELSE 0 END) AS nightWorkHour, SUM(CASE WHEN a.holiday_work_hour IS NOT NULL THEN a.holiday_work_hour ELSE 0 END) AS hoildayWorkHour,
SUM(CASE WHEN a.lateness_minutes IS NOT NULL THEN a.lateness_minutes ELSE 0 END) AS latenessMinutes,
bt.business_trip_id AS businessTripId, bt.start_date AS businessTripStart, bt.end_date AS businessTripEnd,
ab.absence_id AS absenceId, lv.leave_days AS leaveDays
FROM employee e LEFT JOIN attendance a ON e.emp_id = a.emp_id LEFT JOIN business bt ON a.attendance_id = bt.attendance_id LEFT JOIN absence ab ON a.attendance_id = ab.attendance_id LEFT JOIN leave lv ON a.attendance_id = lv.attendance_id
WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND ( (#{category} = '일반근무' AND a.night_work_hour IS NULL AND a.holiday_work_hour IS NULL) OR (#{category} = '야근' AND a.night_work_hour IS NOT NULL) OR (#{category} = '휴일근무' AND a.holiday_work_hour IS NOT NULL) OR (#{category} = '출장' AND bt.business_trip_id IS NOT NULL) )
GROUP BY e.emp_id

choose.when: SELECT emp_id, work_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, night_work_hour, holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '근무' AS work_status FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date = #{workDate} AND check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND check_out_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT emp_id, work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, NULL AS night_work_hour, NULL AS holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, CAST(lateness_count AS CHAR) AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, lateness_dates, lateness_count AS lateness_counts, '지각' AS work_status FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date = #{workDate} AND lateness_count > 0

SELECT emp_id, absence_date AS work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, NULL AS night_work_hour, NULL AS holiday_work_hour, absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '결근' AS work_status FROM absence WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND absence_date = #{workDate}

SELECT emp_id, #{workDate} AS work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, NULL AS night_work_hour, NULL AS holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, business_id AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '출장' AS work_status FROM business WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND #{workDate} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT emp_id, #{workDate} AS work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, NULL AS night_work_hour, NULL AS holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '휴가' AS work_status FROM leave WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND #{workDate} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT emp_id, work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, night_work_hour, NULL AS holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '야근' AS work_status FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date = #{workDate} AND night_work_hour > 0

SELECT emp_id, work_date, NULL AS check_in_time, NULL AS check_out_time, NULL AS night_work_hour, holiday_work_hour, NULL AS absence_id, NULL AS business_trip_id, NULL AS lateness_minutes, NULL AS leave_id, NULL AS lateness_dates, 0 AS lateness_counts, '휴일근무' AS work_status FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date = #{workDate} AND holiday_work_hour > 0

mapper.select: SELECT l.leave_id AS leaveId, l.emp_id AS empId, l.upload_date AS uploadDate, l.leave_start_date AS leaveStartDate, l.leave_end_date AS leaveEndDate, l.leave_status AS leaveStatus, l.leave_days AS leaveDays, a.approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType FROM LEAVE l LEFT JOIN APPROVAL a ON l.leave_id = a.ref_id LEFT JOIN FILE f ON l.leave_id = f.ref_id WHERE l.emp_id = #{empId} AND l.leave_start_date >= #{startDate} AND l.leave_end_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY l.leave_start_date DESC

SELECT l.leave_id AS leaveId, l.emp_id AS empId, l.upload_date AS uploadDate, l.leave_start_date AS leaveStartDate, l.leave_end_date AS leaveEndDate, l.leave_status AS leaveStatus, l.leave_days AS leaveDays, a.approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType FROM LEAVE l LEFT JOIN APPROVAL a ON l.leave_id = a.ref_id LEFT JOIN FILE f ON l.leave_id = f.ref_id WHERE l.emp_id = #{empId} AND #{date} BETWEEN l.leave_start_date AND l.leave_end_date ORDER BY l.leave_start_date DESC

SELECT l.leave_id AS leaveId, l.emp_id AS empId, l.upload_date AS uploadDate, l.leave_start_date AS leaveStartDate, l.leave_end_date AS leaveEndDate, l.leave_status AS leaveStatus, l.leave_days AS leaveDays, a.approval_confirmed AS approvalConfirmed, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType FROM LEAVE l LEFT JOIN APPROVAL a ON l.leave_id = a.ref_id LEFT JOIN FILE f ON l.leave_id = f.ref_id WHERE l.leave_id = #{leaveId}
SELECT l.leave_id, l.emp_id, l.start_date, l.end_date, l.leave_type, l.reason, l.status FROM LEAVE l WHERE l.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY l.start_date DESC
